prompt:
Clean hand-drawn line-art, sharp ink linework, brush-painted flat coloring with hard shadows. SMOOTH painterly source image — NO pixel art, NO 8-bit, NO chunky pixels, NO mosaic dither (dither applied later).

PC-98 title screen, 4:3 WIDE ESTABLISHING SHOT, layered depth.

UPPER HALF: cyberpunk CITYSCAPE — towers, neon, rain.

MIDGROUND: 'EIDOLON CORP' tower, red neon, banners, wordmark LEGIBLE. Plaza far below: 7-9 androids streaming out, varied hairstyles, varied beards, varied faces. Ceremonial: navy coats, gold epaulettes, red sashes, white gloves.

FOREGROUND LEFT: protagonist STANDING on SOLID CONCRETE ROOFTOP — concrete ledge, rebar, gravel. Feet planted flat. GRAVITY-APPLIED. GROUNDED. Not floating, not hovering, not levitating, not on hoverboard or hover-platform. Hooded dark long coat, BACK to viewer, looking DOWN at androids below. Too far for them to spot him.

ONLY text 'GHOST PROCESS' in dripping red horror font bottom-left.

Style: Snatcher late-80s PC-98 mature cyberpunk, no anime no moe. Sharp ink, painterly color, hard shadows. Palette: deep blue, cyan, blood red, gold.

Avoid: cartoon, kawaii, chibi, cute, big dough eyes, 3D render, photorealistic, CGI, smooth gradient shading, super-deformed, stubby limbs, all-white figure, monochrome pale, non-human, feral beast, watermark, signature, frame border, jump scare, pixel art, 8-bit, chunky pixels, mosaic dither, scanlines, floating, hovering, levitating, hoverboard, hover-platform

Clean line-art, sharp ink, brush-painted flat coloring with hard shadows. SMOOTH painterly source image — NO pixel art, NO 8-bit, NO dither (applied later).

PC-98 title screen, 4:3 EXTREME HIGH-ANGLE OVERLOOK from rooftop edge.

PROTAGONIST: standing on EDGE of tall rooftop, BACK to viewer, hood up, dark long coat. ONLY SHINS-UP visible — boots and raw concrete ledge occupy bottom-center, camera gaze DOWN. Re-bar, gravel under feet.

ANGLE: extreme high-angle looking STRAIGHT DOWN. EIDOLON CORP tower and plaza FAR BELOW (1/6 size of boots). Plaza androids are TINY ANT-LIKE FIGURES, far below. Vertical lines emphasising tower height. Diagonal rain streaks.

BOTTOM-LEFT QUARTER: plaza far below — TINY marching ants, TINY drones, fog haze. Camera is 200+ meters above ground.

Protagonist is GRAVITY-ANCHORED, FEET PLANTED ON CONCRETE, NOT FLOATING. Androids CANNOT see him.

ONLY text 'GHOST PROCESS' in dripping red horror font at bottom-center, below boots. Style: Snatcher late-80s PC-98 mature cyberpunk, no anime no moe. Sharp ink, hard shadows. Palette: deep blue, cyan, blood red, gold. Cold horror.

Avoid: cartoon, kawaii, chibi, cute, 3D render, photorealistic, CGI, smooth gradient, super-deformed, ground shadow, watermark, signature, frame border, jump scare, pixel art, 8-bit, mosaic dither, scanlines, floating, hovering, levitating, hoverboard, hover-platform, drone under feet, midair protagonist, androids at eye level, close-up androids

Clean line-art, sharp ink, brush-painted flat coloring with hard shadows. SMOOTH painterly source — NO pixel art, NO 8-bit, NO dither (applied later).

PC-98 title screen, 4:3. STORY: recon overwatcher CASING a tower mid-mission.

PROTAGONIST (CENTER-LEFT FOREGROUND): crouched low on rooftop edge, hood up, dark coat roughed-up. Binoculars to face in one hand, DATAPAD on other wrist marked with pen. City-map printout taped to ledge in front, red-ink markings.

HIS ROOFTOP (distinctive): water tank with faded kanji, rusted antenna mast, tar-paper patching. Black canvas bag on ledge corner. HIS PERCH.

HIS TARGET (FAR BELOW, RIGHT THIRD): EIDOLON CORP tower with SPECIFIC SIDE SERVICE-ENTRANCE (back dock, rolling shutter), two patrolling androids on perimeter — navy coats, gold epaulettes, red sashes, white gloves, varied hairstyles and beards. Hard floodlight shadows. Faint red laser-trace.

ACTION: JUST finished marking pass, LOWERING binoculars, eyes shifting to datapad, furrowed brow — CALCULATING.

Androids 1/8 size of protagonist (200m elevation). Diagonal rain.

ONLY text 'GHOST PROCESS' in dripping red horror font at bottom-right corner.

PC-98 title screen, 4:3. STORY: teenage runaway hunted through backstreet at night.

PROTAGONIST (CENTER FOREGROUND): mid-sprint, 3/4 FROM BEHIND, leaning into run. YOUNG — late teens to early twenties, lean and hungry, NOT grizzled. Slightly-too-young face glimpsed in profile. Messy unwashed hair. Cheap thrift-store windbreaker two sizes too big, frayed cuffs, caught in wind. Cheap sneakers pounding wet cobblestone, one kicking up splash. Hands pumping.

CHASE: alley, cobblestones slick with rain. Smoke/vapor pouring from a drain as he runs past. Puddles reflecting his silhouette. Walls closing in — TRAP. One hand skims brickwork as he banks a corner.

THREAT (FAR BACKGROUND, soft focus): TWO patrolling androids in ceremonial navy coats and red sashes, half a block back. Red eye-glow. Chasing but framing makes HIM the hero.
